top_signals.title: Dakota Gold books high-grade assays at Richmond Hill
top_signals.summary: Dakota Gold reports high-grade gold and silver drill results at Richmond Hill, boosting open-pit resource growth ahead of its PFS.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: GoldStone surges 36% as Hong Kong miner takes 21% stake
top_signals.summary: Funding and new strategic shareholder give the Ghana-focused gold developer flexibility to expand drilling.
